title: Meta to turn employees into ‘AI builders’, reorganize teams into smaller pods amid Reality Labs layoffs: Report
snippet: Meta is rebranding employees as AI builders, organizing them into pods within its Reality Labs division, as per a new report. The pilot program is aimed at enhancing engineering productivity and product quality through cross-disciplinary work

title: Apple to 'distill' Google's Gemini into smaller models to power localized iPhone AI features: Report
snippet: Apple's partnership with Google allows it to ‘distill’ Gemini model to create smaller models to run AI features on device on iPhones. Apple had earlier this year announced its partnership with Google to power Siri and run other AI features

title: Discord says technical issue resolved hours after users complained of downtime
snippet: Discord had reported an issue after 14,000 users faced issues in connecting on voice call. Many reported seeing the message ‘awaiting endpoint’, signaling a failure to establish voice communication

title: Gemini gets a major upgrade as Google adds 3-minute AI music generation: here's how it works
snippet: Gemini's new Lyria 3 Pro integration enables the creation of 3-minute music tracks with improved fidelity and customization. It supports diverse applications, from study music to jingles, while adhering to copyright policies with embedded SynthID watermarks for content verification.

title: Reddit will now ask accounts with ‘fishy behavior’ to verify they are human: here's how it will work
snippet: Reddit is implementing measures to ensure users interact with real people, not AI. Reddit CEO Steve Huffman announced a targeted verification system for suspicious accounts and the use of third-party tools to confirm human identity of its users.

title: WWDC 26: Apple to unveil dedicated Siri chatbot and systemwide AI agent in iOS 27, says report
snippet: Apple is set to unveil a standalone Siri app and new features on June 8 at WWDC 26. The AI update, codenamed Campo, aims to provide a chatbot-like experience and deeper integration across iOS and Mac applications with the aim to turn it into a systemwide AI agent.

title: Samsung Galaxy A37, Galaxy A57 with Exynos SoC, 5,000mAh battery launched: Price, specs and more
snippet: Samsung has launched the Galaxy A37 and A57, featuring triple cameras, 5,000mAh batteries, and AI enhancements. Both models offer a 6.7-inch FHD+ display, IP68 rating, and run on Android 16-based One UI 8.5, promising six years of updates.

title: Samsung Galaxy A37, A57 Highlights: Galaxy A37, A57 launched in India
snippet: Samsung Galaxy A57 & A37 Launch LIVE: Samsung has launched the Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57 in India.

title: Elon Musk overrules product chief Nikita Bier, pauses X's controversial region-based payout strategy
snippet: Elon Musk has paused a new revenue sharing policy for X after creators expressed concerns.Musk acknowledged the feedback from the users and noted that there is a need for further consideration.

title: Travel tech firm Navan sees strong 2027 revenue on demand from new customers
snippet: The Palo Alto, California-based firm makes a bulk of its revenue from big enterprise customers, which includes companies in the ‌AI & technology, ⁠manufacturing and ⁠health sectors.

title: Donald Trump names Nvidia, Meta CEOs to science and tech council
snippet: Google co-founder Sergey Brin and AMD CEO Lisa Su ​are also part of the initial batch of 13 members from the industry named to ​the President's Council of Advisors on Science and Technology (PCAST).

snippet: When the former Google executive entered the space industry in 2021, SpaceX ​was already one of the world's most sought‑after private companies, valued at about $75 ​billion, with shares largely locked up by early backers and institutions close to Musk. title: Meta, Google lose US case over social media harm to kids
snippet: The jury found Meta liable for $4.2 million in damages and Google for $1.8 million, small amounts for ​two of the world's most valuable companies with annual capital spending over $100 billion each.

title: Govt crackdown on underage scrolling; UPI incentives decline
snippet: Happy Thursday! The government is debating social media restrictions for children in India. This and more in today’s ETtech Morning Dispatch.

title: UPI, RuPay subsidy shrinks to Rs 8,000 crore over four years
snippet: The digital payments industry has received about Rs 8,000 crore in subsidy payments over four years for UPI and RuPay debit card payments, against a higher allocation. The government removed MDR on these payments, and the fintech industry is yet to receive FY26 payouts, amid concerns over costs, slo

title: Centre logs into chat on social media child lock
snippet: The Centre is building its stance on banning or restricting social media usage for children, with consultations held to assess technical capabilities of platforms. title: Elmed Life Sciences raises $2.7 million from Nabard-backed Agrisure Fund
snippet: Elmed Life Sciences has raised $2.7 million from Agrisure Fund, which is managed by Nabard-backed Nabventures. The company develops and manufactures probiotic and biological solutions for animal health, aquaculture, agriculture, and human health.

snippet: Axiom Math, a startup based in Palo Alto, California, has released a free new AI tool for mathematicians, designed to discover mathematical patterns that could unlock solutions to long-standing problems.
